content.en:
Ye Tian had just become a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, and he didn't know much about the level of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, so he also asked these half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm for some knowledge, after all, they didn't know how long they had been practicing at this level, and their experience was naturally extremely rich.

Perhaps each half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm may not impart much knowledge, but each one imparts a little bit more, plus there is also a lot of inheritance knowledge about the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm in the Extreme Creation Tower, Ye Tian can watch it casually, so he gradually understands the cultivation of the level of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the Pole Creation Realm is to break the pole-making chains one by one, and the pole-making chains contain the most primordial pole-making substance, so the more you break it, the stronger the Pole-making body will be.

If you want to break the chain of pole making, you can break it slowly, or you can absorb a large amount of pole making material, so it is easier to break.

However, the Daoless Tower will no longer easily give the reward of Extreme Matter.

After all, those peak half-step perfect controllers also need pole-making substances, so naturally it is impossible to supply them to half-step perfection controllers of the Pole-making Realm who have already broken through!

Therefore, if the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm wants to obtain more Extreme Creation Materials, he needs to work hard to find them.

In addition to breaking the chains of Extreme Creation, the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm can also improve his half-step Perfection Will of the Extreme Creation Realm, as well as the power of the Extreme Creation, which is equivalent to continuously improving his cultivation and strength.

In addition, the Perfection Creation Realm Half-Step Perfection Mastery can also try to create a Perfection Mastery that surpasses the top Perfection Mastery Technique.

The Perfection Control Technique is a Perfect Control Technique that can only be created by a half-step Perfection Master of the Extreme Creation Realm, because this Perfect Control Technique needs to be based on the power of Creation and the Golden Light of Creation Aura.

However, the power of this perfect control technique is far greater than that of the top perfect control technique, and once it is created, it can greatly improve the strength of the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm.

For example, many of these half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm of the Daoless Tower have mastered the Extreme Creation Perfect Control Technique, and their strength is extremely terrifying.

It can be said that there are a lot of things that need to be practiced by the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, and the progress is very terrifying, unless it is really infinite years and can no longer progress, those half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm will impact the perfect master, otherwise they will stay at the level of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm and continue to cultivate.

I have to say that the treatment of the Wudao Tower is still very good.

Therefore, in the following long years, Ye Tian was not too short of resources.

Therefore, he continued to practice to improve his will, control the body, and create the power of the extreme.

As for breaking the chain of pole building, this is somewhat difficult, so there is no need to rush for the time being.

But Ye Tian was trying to create a perfect control technique, after all, once he created a perfect control technique, his strength could increase significantly.

It would take countless years for other half-step Perfection Masters of the Extreme Creation Realm to create an Extreme Perfection Control Technique, but Ye Tian had so many Perfection-level Ancestral Endowments, so if he wanted to create such a Perfection Control Technique, it would not be too difficult, or it would be too long.

Time flies.

Ye Tian made every effort to transform and perfect the top perfection-level ancestral endowment of the Ten Thousand Dao Blade, striving to perfect it into a perfect control technique.

In this way, in the process of continuous comprehension and refinement and practice, after failing again and again, finally after thousands of eternal years, Ye Tian finally created his first Extremely Perfect Control Technique - Ten Thousand Dao Blades!

Ye Tian named it the Ten Thousand Dao Blade, which was also different from the normal Ten Thousand Dao Blade.

After all, Ye Tian could cast a normal top-notch perfect control technique, or he could cast an even more powerful Extreme Ten Thousand Dao Blade, which belonged to two perfect control techniques, but the power was very different.

After creating the Extreme Ten Thousand Dao Blades, Ye Tian's strength was greatly improved.

......

The Ruins of Eternity.

Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, the forbidden place of the sun.

The forbidden land of Yangyan is a piece of land occupied by the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall a long time ago, and it is said to be a forbidden land, which is very dangerous, but it is also a treasure land.

Therefore, the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall sent many strong people to guard the Yangyan Forbidden Land, and was constantly developing the Yangyan Forbidden Land.

And the supreme person in charge of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land is one of the six controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus!

this day.

In a huge city outside the forbidden land of the sun, in the glorious hall, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus and a peak half-step perfect controller were discussing a matter here.

And this pinnacle half-step perfect controller is none other than the most amazing son of the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus - the Wyvern Master!

"Father, has the polar substance really been found outside the Yang Yan Forbidden Land?"

The Wyvern Controller said excitedly.

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus smiled and said, "It is true that the Extreme Creation Substance has been discovered, and the news should not have leaked out yet." After all, many half-step perfect controllers don't know what a polar substance is, and they haven't seen it. However, you should know that even in the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, there are still some peak half-step perfect controllers who need to create extreme matter, and some of them belong to the other five perfect masters. The Extreme Matter is enough for all six of us to fight for in a desperate manner, so I'm going to keep it a secret. "

"Father is right, he should hide it. If I obtain these Extreme Creation Materials, I may be able to break through to the Extreme Creation Realm as a half-step perfect controller, and when the time comes, the combat power will not be weaker than the weaker perfect controller, and our vein will have a much greater say in the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace!" said the Flying Dragon Controller excitedly.

"Son, don't get too excited. The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus hurriedly said, "Although the Extreme Creation Substance has been discovered, this forbidden land is still very dangerous, and I can't enter the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, otherwise it will attract the attention of the other five perfect controllers." And as far as I know, those polar creation substances are in the deepest part of the Yang Flame Forbidden Land, where there are many terrible creatures, and you must send some half-step perfect controllers into the Sun Flame Forbidden Land to attract the attention of those creatures, and then you yourself enter there and take those extreme creation substances with you. "

"Father, sending some half-step perfect controllers into the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land is tantamount to sending them to death, those people will definitely not do it, right? Moreover, if they leak the news to the other five perfect controllers, it will still be very troublesome!"

The Wyvern Controller frowned.

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus smiled slightly: "Don't worry, I won't use those half-step perfect controllers with backgrounds, there are still many half-step perfect controllers without backgrounds in the Ten Thousand Dragon Palace." For example, those ordinary half-step perfect controllers who were mining in the forbidden land of Yangyan this time, although they didn't know the specific situation, they might have some guesses. Just send their ontology in, and by the way, they will be killed, and the impact will not be great, as long as you take away the Extreme Creation Substance, and then refine all of them, when the time comes, those five perfect controllers will know, and there will be no way to change the facts. "

"Father is right, then everything will be arranged by father!"

The Wyvern Controller said excitedly.

"Then wait here!"

After the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus finished speaking, the body collapsed.

This is just an incarnation of him, after all, it is impossible for his body to come to the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, and his body is still in the headquarters of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus secretly gathered many half-step perfect controllers together and sent them to the side of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land.

And one of the half-step perfect controllers was Ye Tian's master, the Ten Elements Ancestor.

The main body of the Ten Elements Ancestor usually cultivates at the headquarters of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, and the will clone mines materials on this side of the Yangyan Forbidden Land to obtain some resources.

But this time, the true body of the body was gathered, saying that there was some chance for them.

But soon.

The Ten Elements Ancestor found that he had been sent to the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, and he immediately realized that something was wrong.

"It's strange, my will clone is already here, why do you still let my real body come here, if they all fall, then it really falls. What is the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall for?"

The Ten Elements Ancestor was a little flustered.

After all, once the ontology falls, it really falls!

He had secretly decided that if something really went wrong, he had to ask his apprentice Ye Tian for help as soon as possible.
